title: [FIRRTL] *-nyi.mlir tests are slow
body:
```
********************
Slowest Tests:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
3.78s: CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/inliner-nyi.mlir
3.77s: CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/imdce-nyi.mlir
0.82s: CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/Reduction/trivial.mlir
0.45s: CIRCT :: firtool/include-dirs.fir
0.43s: CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/GrandCentralInterfaces/Wire.fir
0.40s: CIRCT :: firtool/firtool.fir
0.39s: CIRCT :: firtool/firtool.mlir
0.37s: CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/ExtractSeqMems/Compose.fir
0.34s: CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/directories.fir
0.33s: CIRCT :: firtool/split-verilog.mlir
0.30s: CIRCT :: firtool/blackbox.mlir
0.29s: CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/emit-basic.mlir
0.27s: CIRCT :: firtool/print-before.fir
0.27s: CIRCT :: Conversion/ExportVerilog/header-file.mlir
0.26s: CIRCT :: Dialect/LLHD/Simulator/sim_formats.mlir
0.25s: CIRCT :: Dialect/SV/hw-memsim.mlir
0.25s: CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/ExtractSeqMems/Simple2.fir
0.24s: CIRCT :: firtool/memory.fir
0.23s: CIRCT :: Conversion/FIRRTLToHW/lower-to-hw.mlir
0.23s: CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/invalid-reg-pass.fir

Tests Times:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
[    Range    ] :: [               Percentage               ] :: [ Count ]
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
[3.60s,3.80s) :: [                                        ] :: [  2/548]
[3.40s,3.60s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[3.20s,3.40s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[3.00s,3.20s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[2.80s,3.00s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[2.60s,2.80s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[2.40s,2.60s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[2.20s,2.40s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[2.00s,2.20s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[1.80s,2.00s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[1.60s,1.80s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[1.40s,1.60s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[1.20s,1.40s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[1.00s,1.20s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[0.80s,1.00s) :: [                                        ] :: [  1/548]
[0.60s,0.80s) :: [                                        ] :: [  0/548]
[0.40s,0.60s) :: [                                        ] :: [  3/548]
[0.20s,0.40s) :: [*                                       ] :: [ 17/548]
[0.00s,0.20s) :: [**************************************  ] :: [525/548]
```
 inliner-nyi.mlir and imdce-nyi.mlir are slowest tests which take 3~5 sec. The issue itself seems to be caused by llvm-symbolizer.
https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/23fc85f0fbb2e23ff1872dea279cb9319a83ff72/test/Dialect/FIRRTL/imdce-nyi.mlir#L1-L4 I'm actually not sure `not --crash` is helping here, there was no difference between `RUN: circt-opt \n XFAIL` vs `RUN: not --crash` in my environment. 

It's not practically a big problem (it's just extra 2~3 seconds) but it would be nice if we can improve this. (maybe move to integration test?)
